threats.title: TeamPCP Backdoors LiteLLM Versions 1.82.7–1.82.8 Likely via Trivy CI/CD Compromise
threats.summary: TeamPCP, the threat actor behind the recent compromises of Trivy and KICS, has now compromised a popular Python package named litellm, pushing two malicious versions containing a credential harvester, a Kubernetes lateral movement toolkit, and a persistent backdoor. threats.title: Tax Search Ads Deliver ScreenConnect Malware Using Huawei Driver to Disable EDR

threats.title: Hackers Use Fake Resumes to Steal Enterprise Credentials and Deploy Crypto Miner
threats.summary: An ongoing phishing campaign is targeting French-speaking corporate environments with fake resumes that lead to the deployment of cryptocurrency miners and information stealers. threats.title: The Hidden Cost of Cybersecurity Specialization: Losing Foundational Skills
threats.summary: Cybersecurity has changed fast. Roles are more specialized, and tooling is more advanced. On paper, this should make organizations more secure.
